reason: Two lonely souls connect across holiday airwaves for years before finally meeting.
A girl seeks a mystery pen pal, their letters almost crossing until fate intervenes.
A fate-twisted quiz show makes two strangers question timing and destiny.
A pauper courts a princess through chance meetings until timing at last aligns.
A drunk mother’s baby almost meets his birth father through near-miss adoption plots.
Parasites invade but two survivors’ paths brush close through shifting identities.
A rising star and a spy dodge near encounters until one fateful premiere night.
A man hunts for the truth about his past as others just miss crossing his path.
Memory tapes swap lives, and two people nearly cross paths until technology wanes.
A detective and thief nearly collide chasing each other across a city’s catwalks.
